title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official CLI and Python/JS bindings to pull, run and manage GGUF models locally with a built-in OpenAI-compatible server.

title: ollama-python
summary: First-party Python library that wraps the Ollama REST API for chat, generate, embed, pull and list operations.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node, Deno and browsers to interact with the local Ollama server.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: PyPI package integrating Ollama models as LLM, chat and embeddings components inside LangChain.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Full-featured ChatGPT-style web UI (formerly Ollama WebUI) that connects to local Ollama instances.

title: ollama4j
summary: Unofficial Java/Kotlin client for Ollama providing sync/async APIs and Spring Boot starter.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Community-maintained Ruby gem wrapping the Ollama REST API for chat and generate endpoints.

title: ollama-cli-chat
summary: Lightweight Python CLI tool for interactive chatting with any local Ollama model.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that brings local Ollama models into the editor as inline Copilot suggestions.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama and WebUI on Kubernetes with GPU and persistence support.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix derivation to install Ollama and its systemd service declaratively on NixOS.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration letting you use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up an Ollama service inside CI pipelines for testing LLM-powered features.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Unofficial Rust crate providing strongly-typed async wrappers over the Ollama REST API.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Community C# SDK for .NET 6+ with chat, generate and model management methods.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hosted Discord bot that lets servers chat with local Ollama models via slash commands.

title: ollama-streamlit
summary: Streamlit chat app template that connects to Ollama and adds RAG via Chroma vector database.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin to summarize notes, brainstorm ideas and answer questions using local Ollama models.
